calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Personal Representative.

Ms. Mannion reports that she and the appointed Examiner had exchanged emails regarding the Examiner's notes, and it appears as though the Examiner's calculations were incorrect and all issues regarding the notes have been resolved. Ms. Mannion repots that an updated proposed order has been submitted which includes the names of the heirs, including successors-in-interest to the post-deceased siblings. The court informs Ms. Mannion that the order that the court has in the file states that a new order is required. The court advises that it will confirm with the Examiner whether the updated proposed order has been received and contact Ms. Mannion if needed. Ms. Mannion advises that she can resubmit the updated proposed order if required.

The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Personal Representative.

The court calls this matter and in open court asks if there are any objections to this petition. None are presented.

The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
